touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt to Levi Almeida, Director of CS at ZenGroup. No answer, left voicemail introducing AskElephant's onboarding automation capabilities.
Second cold call attempt to Levi Almeida. No answer, left brief follow-up voicemail referencing previous message.
Cold email sent to Levi highlighting pain points in manual onboarding processes for professional services firms. Levi responded expressing interest in learning more about automation capabilities.

questions_asked.question: Can you share more details about how the automation works for onboarding workflows?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely - I'd love to walk you through it on a call. Are you available this week?

touches.ai_summary: Initial qualification call with Levi. Discussed current onboarding pain points at ZenGroup - heavily manual process taking 3-4 weeks per client. Levi mentioned they're looking to scale without adding headcount. Brief overview of AskElephant's automation features provided.

questions_asked.question: How many clients do you currently onboard per month?
questions_asked.answer: About 8-10 new clients monthly, expected to grow to 15-20 in next quarter

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline for your platform?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks depending on complexity of existing workflows

next_steps: Levi to review current onboarding workflow documentation
Schedule deeper discovery call next week

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call continued. Levi walked through their current onboarding workflow in detail - lots of manual data entry, document collection, and handoffs between teams. Discussed how AskElephant could automate 60-70% of repetitive tasks. Levi seems enthusiastic but mentioned he'll need to get buy-in from leadership.

questions_asked.question: Who else would be involved in evaluating a solution like this?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly my team for now. I have budget authority for tools under $5K, but would loop in our COO for visibility.

questions_asked.question: Do you integrate with our existing CRM and project management tools?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with most major platforms. Which ones are you using?

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision on this?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally within 4-6 weeks. We're feeling the pain now with our growth trajectory.

next_steps: Rep to send demo video and case studies
Schedule discovery call to map specific workflows

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call focusing on technical requirements and workflow mapping. Levi shared screen to walk through their current process. Identified 5 key automation opportunities. Discussed team size (would need 5 seats initially). Levi mentioned budget is tight this quarter but sees clear ROI.

questions_asked.question: Have you evaluated other automation platforms for this use case?
questions_asked.answer: Not formally, but we've looked at a few options casually. Nothing has quite fit our needs.

questions_asked.question: What kind of support and training do you provide during implementation?
questions_asked.answer: We include dedicated onboarding support and unlimited training sessions for the first 30 days.

questions_asked.question: Can we start with a smaller pilot before rolling out to the full team?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely - many customers start with 3-5 seats and expand after seeing results.

objections: Budget is constrained this quarter with other initiatives already approved
next_steps: Rep to prepare custom demo for next week
Levi to discuss with team and gather additional requirements

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with custom demo recording showing ZenGroup's specific workflow automated in AskElephant. Also included ROI calculator estimating 120 hours saved per month. Levi responded positively, said the demo looked great and wants to discuss pricing options.

questions_asked.question: What's the pricing structure for the unlimited automation tier?
questions_asked.answer: I'll put together a few options for our next call - can we connect Thursday?

next_steps: Schedule proposal call to review pricing

touches.ai_summary: Proposal call presenting pricing options. Presented standard pricing ($5,300 ACV for 5 seats, unlimited automation). Levi expressed strong interest but mentioned budget constraints - asking if there's flexibility on pricing. Discussed payment terms and implementation timeline. Levi wants to move forward but needs to get internal approval on budget.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on the pricing given we're a smaller team?
questions_asked.answer: Let me see what I can do - what budget range were you thinking?

questions_asked.question: Can we do monthly payments instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: We typically require annual commitment but can do quarterly payments with a small increase.

questions_asked.question: When would you ideally want to start implementation?
questions_asked.answer: As soon as possible - we're already behind on our onboarding capacity.

questions_asked.question: Should we include your COO in the next conversation to expedite approval?
questions_asked.answer: Let me discuss with them first and see if they have questions. I'll let you know.

objections: Pricing is higher than anticipated budget
Need to get internal approval for this spend
next_steps: Rep to prepare revised proposal with flexible payment terms
Levi to discuss with leadership and provide feedback

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting to discuss business case and alignment. Still only Levi on the call - mentioned COO trusts his judgment on tools. Reviewed ROI calculations and implementation plan. Levi reiterated budget concerns and asked for best possible pricing to make this work this quarter.

questions_asked.question: What's the absolute best pricing you can offer for 5 seats with annual commitment?
questions_asked.answer: I can likely get approval for around $3,600 annually if we can close this month. Would that work?

questions_asked.question: Are there any additional costs we should plan for - implementation fees, overage charges, etc.?
questions_asked.answer: No implementation fees, and unlimited automation tier has no overage charges. All-in pricing.

questions_asked.question: If we can hit that pricing, can you commit to moving forward this week?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, if you can get me a formal proposal at $3,600, I can get it approved and signed by end of week.

next_steps: Rep to get discount approval internally
Levi to route for signature once received

touches.ai_summary: Pricing call to finalize commercial terms. Presented formal proposal at $3,600 ACV (32% discount from list) with annual payment, 5 seats, unlimited automation tier. Levi confirmed this works within budget. Discussed contract terms and implementation timeline. Levi mentioned legal review should be quick since it's a standard SaaS agreement.

questions_asked.question: What's your cancellation policy if this doesn't work out for us?
questions_asked.answer: 30-day notice required, but we're confident in the results. Our renewal rate is 95%.

questions_asked.question: Do you need any custom terms in the contract or is our standard agreement acceptable?
questions_asked.answer: Standard should be fine - I'll have our operations manager review it quickly.

questions_asked.question: When can we start implementation after signature?
questions_asked.answer: We can kick off within 48 hours of signed contract. I'll assign a dedicated implementation specialist.

next_steps: Levi to route internally for approval

touches.ai_summary: Final negotiation call to address contract questions from ZenGroup's operations team. Discussed data security provisions, SLA commitments, and renewal terms. Clarified that pricing is locked for 12 months with no automatic price increases. Levi confirmed all concerns addressed and contract is ready for final signature. Expects to have fully executed agreement by end of week.

questions_asked.question: Can we add a clause for 60-day notice on renewal pricing changes?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can add that - standard practice for us anyway.

questions_asked.question: What's the process if we want to add more seats mid-contract?
questions_asked.answer: Simple amendment - prorated pricing for remainder of term, then included in renewal.

questions_asked.question: Any other blockers to getting this signed this week?
questions_asked.answer: No, we're good to go. Just waiting for final signature from our finance approver.

questions_asked.question: Who should I coordinate with on implementation once contract is signed?
questions_asked.answer: Me - I'll be the main point of contact and will bring in our operations manager as needed.

next_steps: Revise contract with 60-day renewal notice clause
